---

### 2. **Key File Contents Summary**

#### **frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx**
- **Purpose**: Top header component (sticky, z-30)
- **Content**:
  - Left: Page title & optional subtitle with visual accent bar
  - Right: Theme toggle (Sun/Moon icon) & GitHub link button
- **Props**: `title` (string), `subtitle?` (string)
- **Uses**: `useTheme` hook for dark/light mode

#### **frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx**
- **Purpose**: Fixed left navigation sidebar (64px/w-64 width, z-40)
- **Content**:
  - Logo section with "DailyBalance" branding (Spanish: "Tu balance diario")
  - Search button with ⌘K keyboard shortcut
  - Main navigation sections:
    - Dashboard, Mi Día, Finanzas
    - Documentos: Reportes, Archivos, Notas
    - Cuenta: Mi Perfil, Configuración
  - Bottom: User profile info (avatar with "U") & Logout button
- **Navigation**: Uses `react-router-dom` `NavLink` for active state styling
- **Colors**: Uses CSS variables for sidebar-specific theme (sidebar, sidebar-accent, sidebar-border)

#### **frontend/src/styles/index.css**
- **Structure**:
  1. Tailwind imports (`@import "tailwindcss"; @import "tw-animate-css"`)
  2. CSS variables for light theme (:root) and dark theme (.dark class)
  3. Color scheme:
     - **Light**: Blue financial (#2563EB), light gray background (#F6F8FB), success green (#16A34A)
     - **Dark**: Navy background (#0F172A), light blue (#60A5FA), soft green (#4ADE80)
  4. Sidebar-specific variables (sidebar, sidebar-foreground, sidebar-accent, etc.)
  5. Chart colors (5 palette colors for data visualization)
  6. Radius scale (sm, md, lg, xl)
  7. Base layer styles (border, outline, background)

#### **frontend/index.html**
- **Simple entry point**:
  - Single `<div id="root"></div>` for React mounting
  - Favicon: logo_dailybalance.png
  - Script: `/src/app/main.tsx` (module type)

#### **Tailwind Configuration**
- **NOT a separate file** - Using Tailwind CSS 4 with Vite plugin
- **Vite plugin**: `@tailwindcss/vite` in vite.config.ts
- **CSS Variables**: Defined in index.css (not traditional tailwind.config.js)
- **No tailwind.config.ts/js** because Tailwind 4 uses Vite integration

#### **frontend/src/app/App.tsx**
- **Currently unused** - old Vite template code (counter example)
- **Actual app routing** is in routes.tsx

#### **frontend/src/app/routes.tsx** (Router Configuration)
- **Structure**:
  - Public routes: `/login` (no layout)
  - Protected routes: All other routes wrapped in `<AppLayout>`
- **Routes** (all use AppLayout wrapper with title/subtitle):
  - `/dashboard` → DashboardPage
  - `/daily` → DailyPage (task management)
  - `/currency` → CurrencyPage (finances)
  - `/reports` → ReportPage
  - `/files` → ArchivesPage
  - `/notes` → NotePage
  - `/profile` → UserProfilePage
  - `/settings` → SettingsPage
  - `*` → NotFoundPage

#### **frontend/src/app/main.tsx** (Entry Point)
```typescript
createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <BrowserRouter>
      <AppRoutes />
      <Toaster position="top-right" richColors />  // Toast notifications
    </BrowserRouter>
  </StrictMode>,
)
```

---

### 3. **Layout Structure - How It Works**

```
App Hierarchy:
└── BrowserRouter (from React Router)
    └── AppRoutes (Router configuration)
        └── Routes (all protected routes use this pattern)
            └── <AppLayout title="..." subtitle="...">  ← Wraps all protected pages
                ├── <Sidebar />              ← Fixed left, z-40, w-64
                └── <div className="pl-64">  ← Offset for sidebar width
                    ├── <Navbar />           ← Sticky top, z-30
                    └── <main className="p-6">
                        └── {children}       ← Page content (DashboardPage, etc.)
```

**Key Layout Details**:
1. **Sidebar**: 
   - Fixed position, left-0, top-0, z-40
   - Width: w-64 (256px)
   - Height: h-screen (full viewport)
   - Contains logo, navigation, and user profile
   - Flex column layout with flex-1 for nav overflow

2. **Main Content Area**:
   - pl-64 padding-left (offset for sidebar)
   - Contains Navbar and main content

3. **Navbar**:
   - Sticky top-0, z-30 (above content, below sidebar)
   - h-16 height
   - Flex between: title on left, actions on right
   - Includes theme toggle + GitHub link

4. **Page Content**:
   - Wrapped in `<main className="p-6">` (padding: 24px)
   - Inside AppLayout, receives dynamic title/subtitle props
   - Child component (page) is rendered as {children}

---

### 4. **Styling System**

**Technology Stack**:
- **Tailwind CSS 4**: With @tailwindcss/vite plugin (no separate config file)
- **CSS Variables**: Defined in index.css for light/dark themes
- **shadcn/ui**: Pre-built components with Radix UI primitives
- **Class Management**: 
  - `cn()` utility from lib/utils.ts (uses tailwind-merge + clsx)
  - Component variants via class-variance-authority

**Theme Implementation**:
- **Next-themes**: `useTheme` hook for dark/light switching
- **CSS Classes**: Toggle `.dark` class on html element
- **Variables Cascade**: CSS vars update automatically with class switch

**Color Palette**:
- Primary: Blue (#2563EB light, #60A5FA dark)
- Success: Green (#16A34A light, #4ADE80 dark)
- Destructive: Red (#DC2626 light, #F87171 dark)
- Sidebar: Custom theme variables
- Charts: 5-color palette for data visualization

---

### 5. **Component Usage Pattern**

**Protected Pages Pattern**:
```typescript
<Route 
  path="/dashboard" 
  element={
    <AppLayout title="Dashboard" subtitle="Vista general de tu día">
      <DashboardPage />
    </AppLayout>
  } 
/>
```

**Component Layer**:
1. **Layout Components** (src/components/layout/): Structural wrappers
2. **UI Components** (src/components/ui/): Reusable primitives from shadcn
3. **Feature Components** (src/components/daily/, src/components/finance/): Domain-specific
4. **Page Components** (src/pages/): Container components that compose features
5. **Utilities** (src/lib/, src/hooks/): Helper functions and custom hooks

---

## Summary

The DailyBalance frontend is a **React 19 + Vite** application with:
- **Two-column layout**: Fixed sidebar (left) + main content (right)
- **Tailwind CSS 4** styling with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes
- **shadcn/ui** components for consistency
- **React Router v7** for navigation with protected routes wrapped in AppLayout
- **Top navbar** with theme toggle and GitHub link
- **Responsive sidebar navigation** with sections for main features and account
- **Modular structure**: Separation of layout, UI, pages, and feature components

The key wrapping pattern is: **All protected pages → AppLayout → (Sidebar + Navbar + PageContent)**
```

1	import { Github, Moon, Sun } from "lucide-react";
2	import { Button } from "@/components/ui/Button";
3	import { useTheme } from "@/hooks/useTheme";
4	
5	interface NavbarProps {
6	    title: string;
7	    subtitle?: string;
8	}
9	
10	function Navbar({ title, subtitle }: NavbarProps) {
11	    const { theme, toggleTheme } = useTheme();
12	
13	    return (
14	        <header className="sticky top-0 z-30 flex h-16 items-center justify-between border-b border-border bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60 px-6">
15	            {/* Left Section - Page Title */}
16	            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
17	                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
18	                    <div className="w-1.5 h-6 bg-primary rounded-full" />
19	                    <div>
20	                        <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground">{title}</h1>
21	                        {subtitle && (
22	                            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{subtitle}</p>
23	                        )}
24	                    </div>
25	                </div>
26	            </div>
27	
28	            {/* Right Section - Actions */}
29	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
30	
31	                {/* Theme Toggle */}
32	                <Button 
33	                    variant="ghost" 
34	                    size="icon" 
35	                    className="cursor-pointer"
36	                    onClick={toggleTheme}
37	                >
38	                    {theme === "dark" ? (
39	                        <Sun className="h-5 w-5 transition-all" />
40	                    ) : (
41	                        <Moon className="h-5 w-5 transition-all" />
42	                    )}
43	                    <span className="sr-only">Toggle theme</span>
44	                </Button>
45	
46	                {/* GitHub Link */}
47	                <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" asChild className="cursor-pointer">
48	                    <a
49	                        href="https://github.com"
50	                        target="_blank"
51	                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
52	                    >
53	                        <Github className="h-5 w-5" />
54	                    </a>
55	                </Button>
56	            </div>
57	        </header>
58	    );
59	}
60	
61	export default Navbar;
62
```
</details></tool-use>

1	import * as React from "react"

3	import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

5	/**
6	 * Contenedor de página reutilizable para todas las vistas.
7	 * Centraliza el ancho máximo, el espaciado vertical y un encabezado opcional,
8	 * de modo que todas las pantallas compartan la misma estructura y estética.
9	 */
10	interface PageContainerProps extends React.ComponentProps<"div"> {
11	  title?: string
12	  description?: string
13	  actions?: React.ReactNode
14	}
15	
16	function PageContainer({
17	  title,
18	  description,
19	  actions,
20	  className,
21	  children,
22	  ...props
23	}: PageContainerProps) {
24	  return (
25	    <div
26	      data-slot="page-container"
27	      className={cn(
28	        "mx-auto w-full max-w-7xl space-y-4 sm:space-y-6",
29	        className
30	      )}
31	      {...props}
32	    >
33	      {(title || actions) && (
34	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
35	          {(title || description) && (
36	            <div className="space-y-1">
37	              {title && (
38	                <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight text-foreground sm:text-xl">
39	                  {title}
40	                </h2>
41	              )}
42	              {description && (
43	                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{description}</p>
44	              )}
45	            </div>
46	          )}
47	          {actions && (
48	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">{actions}</div>
49	          )}
50	        </div>
51	      )}
52	      {children}
53	    </div>
54	  )
55	}
56	
57	export { PageContainer }
58

## Frontend Structure Overview - DailyBalance Project

### 1. **Overall Folder Structure**

```
frontend/
├── src/

│   │   ├── main.tsx          (Entry point - initializes React with Router)
│   │   ├── routes.tsx        (Router configuration)
│   │   └── App.tsx           (Deprecated/unused - old template)
│   │
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── layout/
│   │   │   ├── Navbar.tsx    (Top header with theme toggle & GitHub link)
│   │   │   ├── Sidebar.tsx   (Left navigation - 64px width, fixed)
│   │   │   └── AppLayout.tsx (Master wrapper for all protected pages)
│   │   │
│   │   ├── ui/               (shadcn/ui components - reusable primitives)
│   │   │   ├── Button.tsx
│   │   │   ├── Card.tsx
│   │   │   ├── Input.tsx
│   │   │   ├── Dialog.tsx
│   │   │   ├── Form.tsx
│   │   │   ├── PageContainer.tsx (Reusable page wrapper)
│   │   │   ├── StatCard.tsx
│   │   │   ├── Badge.tsx
│   │   │   └── ... (other UI components)
│   │   │
│   │   ├── daily/            (Daily summary components)
│   │   └── finance/          (Finance-related components)
│   │
│   ├── pages/                (Page-level components - not layout wrapped)
│   │   ├── auth/
│   │   │   └── LoginPage.tsx
│   │   ├── dashboard/
│   │   │   └── DashboardPage.tsx
│   │   ├── daily/
│   │   │   └── DailySummaryCard.tsx
│   │   ├── finance/
│   │   │   ├── CurrencyPage.tsx (Main page with tabs)
│   │   │   ├── account-tab.tsx
│   │   │   ├── budget-tab.tsx
│   │   │   ├── category-tab.tsx
│   │   │   ├── currency-tab.tsx
│   │   │   ├── moviment-tab.tsx
│   │   │   └── TransactionList.tsx
│   │   ├── to-do/            (Task management)
│   │   │   ├── DailyPage.tsx
│   │   │   ├── dailyPage-new-form.tsx
│   │   │   ├── dailyPage-detail-form.tsx
│   │   │   ├── CompletedTasksList.tsx
│   │   │   ├── TaskCategoryList.tsx
│   │   │   └── [form components]
│   │   ├── files/
│   │   │   └── archivos-page.tsx
│   │   ├── notes/
│   │   │   └── notes-page.tsx
│   │   ├── reports/
│   │   │   └── report-page.tsx
│   │   ├── user/
│   │   │   ├── UserProfilePage.tsx
│   │   │   └── SettingsPage.tsx
│   │   └── error/
│   │       └── NotFoundPage.tsx
│   │
│   ├── styles/
│   │   └── index.css         (Global styles + Tailwind configuration)
│   │
│   ├── hooks/
│   │   └── useTheme.ts       (Theme toggle hook - dark/light mode)
│   │
│   ├── lib/
│   │   └── utils.ts          (Utility functions - e.g., cn() classname merger)
│   │
│   └── assets/               (Images, logos, etc.)
│
├── index.html               (HTML entry point)
├── package.json            (Dependencies)
├── tailwind.config.ts      (NOT PRESENT - using Tailwind CSS 4 with Vite)
├── tsconfig.json           (TypeScript configuration)
├── vite.config.ts          (Vite configuration)
├── components.json         (shadcn/ui configuration)
└── eslint.config.js        (Linting rules)
```

---

### 2. **Key File Contents Summary**

#### **frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx**
- **Purpose**: Top header component (sticky, z-30)
- **Content**:
  - Left: Page title & optional subtitle with visual accent bar
  - Right: Theme toggle (Sun/Moon icon) & GitHub link button
- **Props**: `title` (string), `subtitle?` (string)
- **Uses**: `useTheme` hook for dark/light mode

#### **frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx**
- **Purpose**: Fixed left navigation sidebar (64px/w-64 width, z-40)
- **Content**:
  - Logo section with "DailyBalance" branding (Spanish: "Tu balance diario")
  - Search button with ⌘K keyboard shortcut
  - Main navigation sections:
    - Dashboard, Mi Día, Finanzas
    - Documentos: Reportes, Archivos, Notas
    - Cuenta: Mi Perfil, Configuración
  - Bottom: User profile info (avatar with "U") & Logout button
- **Navigation**: Uses `react-router-dom` `NavLink` for active state styling
- **Colors**: Uses CSS variables for sidebar-specific theme (sidebar, sidebar-accent, sidebar-border)

#### **frontend/src/styles/index.css**
- **Structure**:
  1. Tailwind imports (`@import "tailwindcss"; @import "tw-animate-css"`)
  2. CSS variables for light theme (:root) and dark theme (.dark class)
  3. Color scheme:
     - **Light**: Blue financial (#2563EB), light gray background (#F6F8FB), success green (#16A34A)
     - **Dark**: Navy background (#0F172A), light blue (#60A5FA), soft green (#4ADE80)
  4. Sidebar-specific variables (sidebar, sidebar-foreground, sidebar-accent, etc.)
  5. Chart colors (5 palette colors for data visualization)
  6. Radius scale (sm, md, lg, xl)
  7. Base layer styles (border, outline, background)

#### **frontend/index.html**
- **Simple entry point**:
  - Single `<div id="root"></div>` for React mounting
  - Favicon: logo_dailybalance.png
  - Script: `/src/app/main.tsx` (module type)

#### **Tailwind Configuration**
- **NOT a separate file** - Using Tailwind CSS 4 with Vite plugin
- **Vite plugin**: `@tailwindcss/vite` in vite.config.ts
- **CSS Variables**: Defined in index.css (not traditional tailwind.config.js)
- **No tailwind.config.ts/js** because Tailwind 4 uses Vite integration

#### **frontend/src/app/App.tsx**
- **Currently unused** - old Vite template code (counter example)
- **Actual app routing** is in routes.tsx

#### **frontend/src/app/routes.tsx** (Router Configuration)
- **Structure**:
  - Public routes: `/login` (no layout)
  - Protected routes: All other routes wrapped in `<AppLayout>`
- **Routes** (all use AppLayout wrapper with title/subtitle):
  - `/dashboard` → DashboardPage
  - `/daily` → DailyPage (task management)
  - `/currency` → CurrencyPage (finances)
  - `/reports` → ReportPage
  - `/files` → ArchivesPage
  - `/notes` → NotePage
  - `/profile` → UserProfilePage
  - `/settings` → SettingsPage
  - `*` → NotFoundPage

#### **frontend/src/app/main.tsx** (Entry Point)
```typescript
createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <BrowserRouter>
      <AppRoutes />
      <Toaster position="top-right" richColors />  // Toast notifications
    </BrowserRouter>
  </StrictMode>,
)
```

---

### 3. **Layout Structure - How It Works**

```
App Hierarchy:
└── BrowserRouter (from React Router)
    └── AppRoutes (Router configuration)
        └── Routes (all protected routes use this pattern)
            └── <AppLayout title="..." subtitle="...">  ← Wraps all protected pages
                ├── <Sidebar />              ← Fixed left, z-40, w-64
                └── <div className="pl-64">  ← Offset for sidebar width
                    ├── <Navbar />           ← Sticky top, z-30
                    └── <main className="p-6">
                        └── {children}       ← Page content (DashboardPage, etc.)
```

**Key Layout Details**:
1. **Sidebar**: 
   - Fixed position, left-0, top-0, z-40
   - Width: w-64 (256px)
   - Height: h-screen (full viewport)
   - Contains logo, navigation, and user profile
   - Flex column layout with flex-1 for nav overflow

2. **Main Content Area**:
   - pl-64 padding-left (offset for sidebar)
   - Contains Navbar and main content

3. **Navbar**:
   - Sticky top-0, z-30 (above content, below sidebar)
   - h-16 height
   - Flex between: title on left, actions on right
   - Includes theme toggle + GitHub link

4. **Page Content**:
   - Wrapped in `<main className="p-6">` (padding: 24px)
   - Inside AppLayout, receives dynamic title/subtitle props
   - Child component (page) is rendered as {children}

---

### 4. **Styling System**

**Technology Stack**:
- **Tailwind CSS 4**: With @tailwindcss/vite plugin (no separate config file)
- **CSS Variables**: Defined in index.css for light/dark themes
- **shadcn/ui**: Pre-built components with Radix UI primitives
- **Class Management**: 
  - `cn()` utility from lib/utils.ts (uses tailwind-merge + clsx)
  - Component variants via class-variance-authority

**Theme Implementation**:
- **Next-themes**: `useTheme` hook for dark/light switching
- **CSS Classes**: Toggle `.dark` class on html element
- **Variables Cascade**: CSS vars update automatically with class switch

**Color Palette**:
- Primary: Blue (#2563EB light, #60A5FA dark)
- Success: Green (#16A34A light, #4ADE80 dark)
- Destructive: Red (#DC2626 light, #F87171 dark)
- Sidebar: Custom theme variables
- Charts: 5-color palette for data visualization

---

### 5. **Component Usage Pattern**

**Protected Pages Pattern**:
```typescript
<Route 
  path="/dashboard" 
  element={
    <AppLayout title="Dashboard" subtitle="Vista general de tu día">
      <DashboardPage />
    </AppLayout>
  } 
/>
```

**Component Layer**:
1. **Layout Components** (src/components/layout/): Structural wrappers
2. **UI Components** (src/components/ui/): Reusable primitives from shadcn
3. **Feature Components** (src/components/daily/, src/components/finance/): Domain-specific
4. **Page Components** (src/pages/): Container components that compose features
5. **Utilities** (src/lib/, src/hooks/): Helper functions and custom hooks

---

## Summary

The DailyBalance frontend is a **React 19 + Vite** application with:
- **Two-column layout**: Fixed sidebar (left) + main content (right)
- **Tailwind CSS 4** styling with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes
- **shadcn/ui** components for consistency
- **React Router v7** for navigation with protected routes wrapped in AppLayout
- **Top navbar** with theme toggle and GitHub link
- **Responsive sidebar navigation** with sections for main features and account
- **Modular structure**: Separation of layout, UI, pages, and feature components

The key wrapping pattern is: **All protected pages → AppLayout → (Sidebar + Navbar + PageContent)**

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>

```typescript
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';

export const BREAKPOINTS = {
  sm: 640,
  md: 768,
  lg: 1024,
  xl: 1280,
  '2xl': 1536,
} as const;

export type BreakpointKey = keyof typeof BREAKPOINTS | 'base';

export function useBreakpoint() {
  const [width, setWidth] = useState(() =>
    typeof window !== 'undefined' ? window.innerWidth : 1024
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleResize = () => setWidth(window.innerWidth);
    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
  }, []);

  const breakpoint: BreakpointKey = (() => {
    if (width >= BREAKPOINTS['2xl']) return '2xl';
    if (width >= BREAKPOINTS.xl) return 'xl';
    if (width >= BREAKPOINTS.lg) return 'lg';
    if (width >= BREAKPOINTS.md) return 'md';
    if (width >= BREAKPOINTS.sm) return 'sm';
    return 'base';
  })();

  return {
    width,
    breakpoint,
    isMobile: width < BREAKPOINTS.md,
    isTablet: width >= BREAKPOINTS.md && width < BREAKPOINTS.lg,
    isLaptop: width >= BREAKPOINTS.lg && width < BREAKPOINTS['2xl'],
    isDesktop: width >= BREAKPOINTS['2xl'],
    isSmallScreen: width < BREAKPOINTS.lg,
  };
}

```

```tsx
import { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import Sidebar from "./Sidebar";
import Navbar from "./Navbar";

interface AppLayoutProps {
    children: React.ReactNode;
    title: string;
    subtitle?: string;
}

function AppLayout({ children, title, subtitle }: AppLayoutProps) {
    const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false);

    const closeSidebar = useCallback(() => setSidebarOpen(false), []);
    const toggleSidebar = useCallback(() => setSidebarOpen((prev) => !prev), []);

    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-background">
            <Sidebar isOpen={sidebarOpen} onClose={closeSidebar} />

            {/* Main content — offset only on large screens where sidebar is always visible */}
            <div className="pl-0 lg:pl-64 transition-all duration-300">
                <Navbar
                    title={title}
                    subtitle={subtitle}
                    onMenuToggle={toggleSidebar}
                />
                <main className="p-4 sm:p-6">
                    {children}
                </main>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
}

export default AppLayout;

```

```tsx
import { useEffect } from "react";
import { NavLink, useNavigate, useLocation } from "react-router-dom";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import logo from "@/assets/logo_dailybalance.png";
import { useBreakpoint } from "@/hooks/useBreakpoint";
import {
    LayoutDashboard,
    Calendar,
    Wallet,
    User,
    Settings,
    Search,
    LogOut,
    FileText,
    FolderOpen,
    BarChart3,
    X,
} from "lucide-react";

interface SidebarProps {
    isOpen: boolean;
    onClose: () => void;
}

interface NavItemProps {
    to: string;
    icon: React.ReactNode;
    label: string;
}

function NavItem({ to, icon, label }: NavItemProps) {
    return (
        <NavLink
            to={to}
            className={({ isActive }) =>
                cn(
                    "flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200",
                    "hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground",
                    isActive
                        ? "bg-sidebar-accent text-sidebar-accent-foreground"
                        : "text-sidebar-foreground/70"
                )
            }
        >
            {icon}
            <span>{label}</span>
        </NavLink>
    );
}

interface NavSectionProps {
    title: string;
    children: React.ReactNode;
}

function NavSection({ title, children }: NavSectionProps) {
    return (
        <div className="space-y-1">
            <h3 className="px-3 text-xs font-semibold text-sidebar-foreground/50 uppercase tracking-wider">
                {title}
            </h3>
            <div className="space-y-0.5">{children}</div>
        </div>
    );
}

function Sidebar({ isOpen, onClose }: SidebarProps) {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const location = useLocation();
    const { isSmallScreen } = useBreakpoint();

    // Auto-close sidebar on navigation (mobile/tablet)
    useEffect(() => {
        if (isSmallScreen) onClose();
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
    }, [location.pathname]);

    // Prevent body scroll when mobile drawer is open
    useEffect(() => {
        document.body.style.overflow = isOpen && isSmallScreen ? "hidden" : "";
        return () => { document.body.style.overflow = ""; };
    }, [isOpen, isSmallScreen]);

    const handleLogout = () => {
        navigate("/login");
    };

    return (
        <>
            {/* Backdrop — visible on small screens when drawer is open */}
            <div
                className={cn(
                    "fixed inset-0 z-30 bg-black/50 lg:hidden",
                    "transition-opacity duration-300",
                    isOpen ? "opacity-100" : "opacity-0 pointer-events-none"
                )}
                onClick={onClose}
                aria-hidden="true"
            />

            {/* Sidebar panel */}
            <aside
                className={cn(
                    "fixed left-0 top-0 z-40 flex h-screen w-64 flex-col bg-sidebar border-r border-sidebar-border",
                    "transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out",
                    // Large screens: always visible regardless of isOpen state
                    // Small screens: slide in/out based on isOpen
                    "lg:translate-x-0",
                    isOpen ? "translate-x-0" : "-translate-x-full"
                )}
            >
                {/* Logo Section */}
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-5 border-b border-sidebar-border">
                    <img
                        src={logo}
                        alt="DailyBalance"
                        className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full object-cover shrink-0"
                    />
                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                        <h1 className="text-lg font-bold text-sidebar-foreground truncate">
                            DailyBalance
                        </h1>
                        <p className="text-xs text-sidebar-foreground/50">Tu balance diario</p>
                    </div>
                    {/* Close button — only on small screens */}
                    <button
                        className="lg:hidden p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-sidebar-accent text-sidebar-foreground/70 hover:text-sidebar-foreground transition-colors shrink-0"
                        onClick={onClose}
                        aria-label="Cerrar menú"
                    >
                        <X className="w-5 h-5" />
                    </button>
                </div>

                {/* Search */}
                <div className="border-b border-sidebar-border p-3">
                    <button className="flex items-center gap-3 w-full px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-sidebar-foreground/70 hover:bg-sidebar-accent hover:text-sidebar-accent-foreground transition-all duration-200">
                        <Search className="w-5 h-5 shrink-0" />
                        <span>Buscar</span>
                        <kbd className="ml-auto text-xs bg-sidebar-accent px-2 py-0.5 rounded hidden sm:inline">
                            ⌘K
                        </kbd>
                    </button>
                </div>

                {/* Navigation */}
                <nav className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-3 py-2 space-y-6">
                    <div className="space-y-0.5">
                        <NavItem
                            to="/dashboard"
                            icon={<LayoutDashboard className="w-5 h-5" />}
                            label="Dashboard"
                        />
                        <NavItem
                            to="/daily"
                            icon={<Calendar className="w-5 h-5" />}
                            label="Mi Día"
                        />
                        <NavItem
                            to="/currency"
                            icon={<Wallet className="w-5 h-5" />}
                            label="Finanzas"
                        />
                    </div>

                    <NavSection title="Documentos">
                        <NavItem
                            to="/reports"
                            icon={<BarChart3 className="w-5 h-5" />}
                            label="Reportes"
                        />
                        <NavItem
                            to="/files"
                            icon={<FolderOpen className="w-5 h-5" />}
                            label="Archivos"
                        />
                        <NavItem
                            to="/notes"
                            icon={<FileText className="w-5 h-5" />}
                            label="Notas"
                        />
                    </NavSection>

                    <NavSection title="Cuenta">
                        <NavItem
                            to="/profile"
                            icon={<User className="w-5 h-5" />}
                            label="Mi Perfil"
                        />
                        <NavItem
                            to="/settings"
                            icon={<Settings className="w-5 h-5" />}
                            label="Configuración"
                        />
                    </NavSection>
                </nav>

                {/* User Profile */}
                <div className="border-t border-sidebar-border p-3">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-sidebar-accent transition-colors cursor-pointer">
                        <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-primary flex items-center justify-center text-primary-foreground font-semibold text-sm shrink-0">
                            U
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-sidebar-foreground truncate">
                                Usuario
                            </p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-sidebar-foreground/50 truncate">
                                m@example.com
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <button
                            onClick={handleLogout}
                            className="p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-sidebar-accent text-sidebar-foreground/50 hover:text-destructive transition-colors shrink-0"
                            title="Cerrar sesión"
                        >
                            <LogOut className="w-4 h-4" />
                        </button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </aside>
        </>
    );
}

export default Sidebar;

```

```tsx
import { Github, Menu, Moon, Sun } from "lucide-react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/Button";
import { useTheme } from "@/hooks/useTheme";

interface NavbarProps {
    title: string;
    subtitle?: string;
    onMenuToggle?: () => void;
}

function Navbar({ title, subtitle, onMenuToggle }: NavbarProps) {
    const { theme, toggleTheme } = useTheme();

    return (
        <header className="sticky top-0 z-30 flex h-16 items-center justify-between border-b border-border bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60 px-4 sm:px-6">
            {/* Left Section */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 sm:gap-4 min-w-0">
                {/* Hamburger button — hidden on large screens */}
                <Button
                    variant="ghost"
                    size="icon"
                    className="lg:hidden cursor-pointer shrink-0"
                    onClick={onMenuToggle}
                    aria-label="Abrir menú"
                >
                    <Menu className="h-5 w-5" />
                </Button>

                {/* Page title */}
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
                    <div className="w-1.5 h-6 bg-primary rounded-full hidden sm:block shrink-0" />
                    <div className="min-w-0">
                        <h1 className="text-base sm:text-xl font-bold text-foreground truncate">
                            {title}
                        </h1>
                        {subtitle && (
                            <p className="text-xs sm:text-sm text-muted-foreground hidden sm:block truncate">
                                {subtitle}
                            </p>
                        )}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            {/* Right Section */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 sm:gap-2 shrink-0">
                <Button
                    variant="ghost"
                    size="icon"
                    className="cursor-pointer"
                    onClick={toggleTheme}
                >
                    {theme === "dark" ? (
                        <Sun className="h-5 w-5 transition-all" />
                    ) : (
                        <Moon className="h-5 w-5 transition-all" />
                    )}
                    <span className="sr-only">Toggle theme</span>
                </Button>

                <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" asChild className="cursor-pointer hidden sm:flex">
                    <a
                        href="https://github.com"
                        target="_blank"
                        rel="noopener noreferrer"
                    >
                        <Github className="h-5 w-5" />
                    </a>
                </Button>
            </div>
        </header>
    );
}

export default Navbar;

```

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-06-26 05:17:30Z)**_

Sin errores de TypeScript en los archivos nuevos. Los únicos warnings son pre-existentes (`Github` deprecated de lucide-react en Navbar, y CSS logical properties en LoginPage — no relacionados a mis cambios).

Aquí está el resumen de lo que se implementó:

---

**`useBreakpoint.ts`** — nuevo hook en `src/hooks/`
- Breakpoints que coinciden exactamente con los de Tailwind: `sm`(640), `md`(768), `lg`(1024), `xl`(1280), `2xl`(1536)
- Flags booleanos: `isMobile`, `isTablet`, `isLaptop`, `isDesktop`, `isSmallScreen`
- Reacciona en tiempo real a cambios de tamaño de ventana

**`AppLayout.tsx`** — actualizado
- Gestiona el estado `sidebarOpen` con `useCallback` para funciones estables
- `pl-0 lg:pl-64` — en móvil no hay offset (sidebar es overlay), en desktop sí

**`Sidebar.tsx`** — actualizado
- `lg:translate-x-0` + `-translate-x-full`/`translate-x-0` condicionalmente: siempre visible en `lg+`, drawer deslizante en pantallas menores
- Backdrop semitransparente (`bg-black/50`) al abrir en móvil, cierra al tocarlo
- Botón **X** en el header (solo visible en `< lg`)
- Se cierra automáticamente al navegar a otra página
- Bloquea el scroll del `body` cuando el drawer está abierto en móvil

**`Navbar.tsx`** — actualizado
- Botón hamburguesa con `lg:hidden` — solo aparece en móvil/tablet
- Título y subtítulo con tamaños responsivos (`text-base sm:text-xl`)
- GitHub link oculto en móvil (`hidden sm:flex`) para no saturar el header pequeño
